prati-√kṣip P. -kṣipati (cf.  Pāṇ. i, 3, 80 ), to throw into (loc.),  MBh.  (v.l. pari-);
to push against, hurt,  Suśr. ;
to reject, despise, oppose, contradict, ridicule, confute,  Kathās. ;  Sarvad. ;  Lalit.
